concepts.title: p-adic norm and completion
concepts.blurb: The p-adic absolute value yields an ultrametric completion Q_p.

concepts.title: Ultrametric topology
concepts.blurb: The strong triangle inequality forces isoceles triangles, clopen balls, and a totally disconnected topology on Q_p.

concepts.title: p-adic expansions and topology
concepts.blurb: Series expansions encode arithmetic with non-Archimedean convergence.

concepts.title: Hensel lifting
concepts.blurb: Approximate roots modulo p lift to genuine p-adic roots under derivative conditions.

concepts.title: Local-global (Hasse) principle
concepts.blurb: A Diophantine problem over Q is studied by solving it over R and every Q_p; for quadratic forms this local data is sufficient, while failures for higher-degree forms are measured by Brauer and Tate-Shafarevich groups.
